title: Code coverage at 73.5% — tests pass but not all paths exercised
evidence: test_coverage=0.735 from retort.db; 7 test functions in handlers_test.go cover CRUD, validation, filtering, health, and invalid-ID but some error paths (e.g. DB failures, malformed JSON edge cases) are untested
suggestion: Add tests for store-level error paths and malformed request bodies to increase coverage
